- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fix)

- [ ] 🧪 Test changes only (test)

## Testing

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for the changes in this PR
- [ ] Coverage remained above 80 % (run `npm run test:coverage`)
- [ ] All CI checks are passing (lint + test + security audit)

---

## Self-Review Checklist

- [ ] Code is clean — no commented-out code, no `console.log` debugging left in
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials are hardcoded anywhere
- [ ] Error messages are user-friendly (no raw stack traces exposed in Discord)
- [ ] README, ONBOARDING.md, or ARCHITECTURE.md are updated if this change
      introduces new env variables, commands, or design decisions
- [ ] The PR is small enough to review in one sitting (if not, split it)
